hero.headline: Viesulai
hero.subheadline: Third squad of the Honor Guard company

about.title: About us
about.p1: "Viesulai" is the third squad of the Lithuanian Riflemen's Union, uniting motivated citizens from across Lithuania who are committed to strengthening the country's defense capability and civic awareness.
about.p2: Our squad is part of the Lithuanian Riflemen's Union – a voluntary paramilitary civic self-defense organization active since 1919. The Riflemen's Union is one of the oldest and largest defense organizations in Lithuania.
about.p3: We bring together people of various professions and backgrounds, united by a shared value – the determination to defend our country and community.

goal1.title: Defense readiness
goal1.description: We develop our members' military and tactical competencies to be prepared to act in critical situations.

goal2.title: Community
goal2.description: We build a strong and unified community where every member feels valued and needed.

goal3.title: Civic education
goal3.description: We strengthen civic awareness and patriotism, encouraging active participation in national defense.

step1.title: Become a rifleman
step1.description: The first step is to become a member of the Lithuanian Riflemen's Union. Register through the official website.

step2.title: Contact us
step2.description: Write us an email or call – we'll answer all your questions about our squad's activities.

step3.title: Submit a transfer request
step3.description: Fill out a transfer request at your regiment to officially join the Viesulai squad.

step4.title: Start your journey
step4.description: Participate in exercises, training sessions, and squad events together with the team.

support.title: Support the squad
support.subtitle: Your support helps us strengthen our defense readiness

gpm.title: 1.2% income tax support
gpm.description: When filing your annual income tax declaration, you can allocate 1.2% of your paid personal income tax to our squad. Search for company code 307633723 or the name "Trečiasis būrys" in the recipient search.

transfer.title: Bank transfer
transfer.description: Transfer your support to VšĮ TREČIASIS BŪRYS bank account LT727300010201946164. Payment purpose: PARAMA (Support).

business.title: Business support
business.description: If you represent a business and wish to contribute to our activities – we can arrange individual agreements. Support can be both financial and material.

form.name: Full name
form.company: Current company (if you are a rifleman)
form.time: How much time can you dedicate per month?
form.skills: Military-related competencies, experience, or other useful skills
form.success: Thank you! We'll get in touch soon.
